title: A randomised study of encorafenib, cetuximab, and FOLFIRI versus FOLFIRI with or without bevacizumab in BRAF V600E-mutant colorectal cancer: BREAKWATER Cohort 3.
abstract: Encorafenib + cetuximab (EC) and mFOLFOX6 or irinotecan, leucovorin, and fluorouracil (FOLFIRI) is approved in several countries for BRAF V600E-mutant metastatic colorectal cancer (mCRC) based on results from the BREAKWATER trial.
journal: Annals of oncology : official journal of the European Society for Medical Oncology
